# Contributing to the Gnosis math sandbox

- Policy: [MATH_SANDBOX.md](./MATH_SANDBOX.md)
- Dependency graph: [GNOSIS_MATH_DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.md](./GNOSIS_MATH_DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.md)

## What belongs in `MathSandbox`

- **Init-first:** modules that build without `import Mathlib` (use `GnosisMathPrelude` for shared `Nat`/`List` helpers).
- **Named axioms:** follow the same discipline as the physics sandbox — no anonymous `sorry` on promoted surfaces.

## What belongs elsewhere

- **Heavy Mathlib:** keep in `ForkRaceFoldTheorems` until peeled; document debt in `MATH_SANDBOX.md`.
- **GreekLogicCanon split:** new Init-only slices go under [`ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon/`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon/); promote stable slices with `import` lines in [`MathSandbox.lean`](../lean/Lean/MathSandbox.lean) (see [`DiscreteBoundary`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon/DiscreteBoundary.lean)). Use [`MathSandboxExtras`](../lean/Lean/MathSandboxExtras.lean) only for transitional or experimental wiring.

## Verification

```bash
cd open-source/gnosis && pnpm run validate:lean-minimal
```

This runs [`lean-minimal`](../lean-minimal/README.md) `lake build` and `node scripts/validate-init-only-import-closure.mjs` (see [`init-only-import-closure.json`](../scripts/init-only-import-closure.json)).
